title: ngc-rs dev-server target
description: Dev-server builder options for @ngc-rs/builder. Mirrors a subset of @angular/build:dev-server so projects can swap one line in angular.json. Anything not listed under properties is intentionally not yet supported and is rejected at validation time.

buildTarget.description: Build builder target to derive options from in the format `project:target[:configuration]`. Currently used only to resolve the build configuration name.

port.description: Port the dev server listens on.

host.description: Host the dev server binds to.

open.description: Open the configured URL in the default browser once the server is ready.

ssl.description: Serve over HTTPS. Currently unsupported by ngc-rs serve. Setting this to true fails the build with an explanatory error.

proxyConfig.description: Path to a JSON proxy configuration file. The shim hosts an in-process reverse proxy and forwards matching requests to the configured target. See https://angular.dev/tools/cli/serve#proxying-to-a-backend-server.

project.description: Path to the project's tsconfig.json passed to ngc-rs serve. Defaults to `tsconfig.json` in the workspace root.

ngcRsBinary.description: Optional override for the ngc-rs binary path. If unset, the shim looks at the NGC_RS_BINARY env var, then a workspace-relative target/release/ngc-rs, and finally PATH.

define.description: Build-time global identifier replacement (mirrors `application.define`). Accepted on the dev-server target for schema parity; values are resolved against the underlying build target.

watch.description: Whether the dev server rebuilds on file changes. Always true in `ngc-rs serve`; setting it to false logs a warning.
